title: Lone Rogue productions: the ultimate in anime and gaming
description: BUSINESS NEWS - If you’ve ever dreamed...
bodyText:
Gallery
                            Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - If you’ve ever dreamed of a place that combines the nostalgia of old-school arcade games with the thrill of modern trading card tournaments, then Lone Rogue Productions is your ultimate destination. Established in 2019, this hidden gem at 10 CJ Langenhoven Street is more than just a shop; it’s an experience where fantasy meets reality, and the young at heart can rediscover the joy of their favourite hobbies.


> It is a magical space for anime enthusiasts and gamers alike.


Step through the doors, and you’re transported into a world where anime dreams come true. Lone Rogue Productions, which is also a member of Wizards of the Coast’s WPN (Wizards Play Network), is anime heaven, filled with shelves of merchandise that cater to every otaku's passion.

From clothing and figurines to digital gaming assets, this dynamic store is dedicated to bringing your favourite anime characters to life through its carefully curated selection of products.

Game on: A paradise for trading card and board game fansLone Rogue Productions isn’t just about anime; it’s a bustling hub for trading card and table top enthusiasts, hosting tournaments for games like Magic: The Gathering (MTG), Yu-Gi-Oh!, Pokémon, Warhammer, and the timeless Dungeons and Dragons.

Their tables are always set up, welcoming gamers of all ages who share a love for strategy, competition, and camaraderie. Whether you’re a seasoned player or just starting, there’s a spot at the table for you.

it’s a bustling hub for trading card and table top enthusiasts, hosting tournaments for games like Magic: The Gathering (MTG)

Play, relax and enjoy unlimited fun They also offer a variety of other gaming experiences, from console gaming to board games. Enjoy a blast from the past with their old-school arcade games, where every pixel brings back memories of carefree childhood days.

The best part? There’s no entrance fee! For just R50, you can indulge in bottomless coffee, and for those seeking an extra boost, they stock Slayer energy drinks to keep you powered up during intense game sessions.

PHOTO GALLERY: Lone Rogue Productions: The ultimate in anime and gaming

Lone Rogue Productions takes you back to your childhood and offers a community hub where fans of all ages can come together, connect, and celebrate their shared passions. With regular events and tournaments, there’s always something happening, making every visit a new adventure. It's a safe environment for children, and owners Ian and Lunique Baker have some pretty magical ideas for the future.


> Visit them


Open from 10:00 to 18:00, Tuesdays to Fridays, and 09:00 to 15:00+ on weekends, including Sundays, Lone Rogue Productions invites you to join the fun, meet fellow enthusiasts, and make memories that last. So, whether you’re here to pick up the latest anime merch, battle it out in a tournament, or simply soak up the atmosphere, you’ll find a welcoming space that feels like home.

At Lone Rogue Productions, they bring fantasy to life—one game, one collectable, and one magical moment at a time. So grab your deck, and your friends, choose your avatar, and let your inner child run wild in the heart of anime paradise!

Visit Lone Rogue Productions for the latest anime merch.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
